duration_policy: CLI-supported integer duration; seedance2.0_vip image2video supports 4-15s

narrative_function: CLI-legal 4-second SHOT-02 volumetric rain-shell shockwave source intended to be edited down to the strongest 1-2 seconds.
motion_policy: Preserve locked keyframe composition; create airborne rain displacement cavity centered on the contact point; ground ripples secondary only; no new combo.

allowed_next_action: Only submit after explicit user approval for exactly one Dreamina image2video task after command-contract preflight.
